Binary strings of length 100 are elements of the vector space $\mathbb{F}_2^{100}$.

"Write <missing 3> if $w$ has 1's in every component $v$ does..."
This describes the subset relation. If $w$ has 1s where $v$ has 1s, then $v \subseteq w$ (in terms of support).
Looking at the list, **expression 30** is `v \subseteq w`.
So, <missing 3> = 30.

So, <missing 4> = 4, <missing 5> = 21.
